Can I Use? A Five-Minute Guide to Checking CSS / HTML / JS Browser Support

Frontend devs use new CSS / HTML / JS features all the time — sometimes without realizing they're not supported in every browser. Can I Use is the go-to support-checking service. This post is a five-minute tour of using it — searching for features, reading the support matrix and color legend, the vendor-prefix tooling, and a quick aside on what CSS prefixes are and when they matter.
